name: remindb
description: Token-efficient agentic memory database. Mounts remindb as an MCP server, exposing MemoryFetch, MemorySearch, MemoryWrite, MemoryCompile, MemoryDelta, MemorySummarize, MemoryHistory, and MemoryTree as tools over a compiled SQLite view of the workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Compiled SQLite memory for coding agents, exposed over MCP.
interface.longDescription: remindb compiles a workspace into a SQLite database and exposes eight token-budgeted MCP tools (MemoryFetch, MemorySearch, MemoryWrite, MemoryCompile, MemoryDelta, MemorySummarize, MemoryHistory, MemoryTree). Agents read and update a compiled view of the workspace instead of re-reading files, cutting tokens by 60–90% on typical dev loops.
